title: Ophiorrhiza ridsdalei
taxonomy: Ophiorrhiza ridsdalei is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is classified as belonging to the genus Ophiorrhiza, which consists of about 100 species of plants. The genus Ophiorrhiza is part of the larger family Rubiaceae, which is one of the largest families of flowering plants. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and is typically found in tropical rainforests. It is a climbing plant with small, white flowers and is often used in traditional medicine.
